raw_title: The Weight of the Rainbow: LGBTQ+ Journalists’ Navigation of Mental Health and Identity in Digital News Ecosystems
title_en: The Weight of the Rainbow: LGBTQ+ Journalists’ Navigation of Mental Health and Identity in Digital News Ecosystems
title_zh: 彩虹的重量：LGBTQ+记者在数字新闻生态系统中对心理健康与身份的探索
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了LGBTQ+记者在数字新闻环境中如何应对心理健康和身份认同的挑战。它关注这些记者在快速变化的媒体行业中的独特经历和压力。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how LGBTQ+ journalists navigate mental health and identity challenges in digital news environments. It focuses on the unique experiences and pressures these journalists face in the fast-evolving media industry.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注数字新闻行业中少数群体记者的职业福祉和身份整合，旨在促进更包容和支持性的媒体工作环境。
research_direction_en: The research direction focuses on the professional well-being and identity integration of minority journalists in digital news, aiming to foster more inclusive and supportive media workplaces.
